feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Alert Management module
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to use the Alert Management module in my SAP Business One 10.0 to create an Alerts Query. I already enabled the Alert Service checkbox and "Send Alert for Activities Scheduled for Today" in the General Settings but despite of this, Condition and Document Tab in Alert Management - Alert Details were still missing.

When I checked the predefined alerts, it has Condition and Documents Tabs though. Any ideas?



Sincerely,

Edzel.

entry.title: Is there a way to add the source of the journal entry?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community

I hope this message finds you well.

Is there a way to add the source of the journal entry?

In the foreign currency revaluation gain or loss,

the journal entry is created as JE.

I would like to differentiate it with another value.

If there's anything more you need,

just let me know!

Below Attachment.

Thank you!!!

Best Regards

entry.title: I'm facing the same issue please help anybody
entry.content: GST regular item or GST nil rated item cannot be used on Bill of Supply

entry.title: Create records in a user table using the Service Layer API
entry.content:
I need to know if it is possible to create records in user-created tables using Service Layer API?

I wanted to avoid connecting directly to the database.

entry.title: 10000304 - Invalid currency SAP B1 error
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am facing error like 10000304 - Invalid currency.

Here, All G/L (CoA) are marked as an All Currency. 

Business partner are marked as their respective currency.

What is the issue here? 

SAP B1, SAP Business One, SBO

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Error when performing Inventory Transfer
entry.content:
Hi , 

I am facing an issue , here branch is implemented and when user is performing Inventory transfer , defining warehouses , bin location and the concerned branches after selecting  update button , system is generating this message.

"Warehouse is not assigned to the same branch as the document [Inventory Transfer - To Warehouse Code] , 'CN001' [Message 1320000747-9]

need help to get rid of this

entry.title: Create new button with event SAP B1
entry.content:
I would like to know if it is possible to create a button, for example, on the invoice creation form, with the purpose of generating an http request to an external service and then updating the open record. Example: Generate a multibanco reference.

I have the b1 usability package addon installed on SAP. I don't know if this addon also helps to implement this functionality.

Or do you have any ideas for implementing this type of functionality?

Thank you.

entry.title: How to set Default Printer
entry.content:
Hi

  In below code is it possible to set default printer & path of Pdf file to be saved

oCmpSrv = oCompany.GetCompanyService();
oReportLayoutService = (ReportLayoutsService)oCmpSrv.GetBusinessService(SAPbobsCOM.ServiceTypes.ReportLayoutsService);
oPrintParam = (ReportLayoutPrintParams)oReportLayoutService.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.ReportLayoutsServiceDataInterfaces.rlsdiReportLayoutPrintParams);
oPrintParam.LayoutCode = "INV20005";
oPrintParam.DocEntry = 34681;

oReportLayoutService.Print(oPrintParam);

Thanks

entry.title: Year-End Closing Integration Feature in Brazil Version of SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community

I hope this email finds you well

I am writing to inquire about the year-end closing integration posting feature in the Brazil version of SAP Business one.

Why doesn't the Brazil version of SAP Business one have the year-end closing integration posting feature?

Is it possible to enable it through settings?

below attachment

Thank you for your assistance

Best Regards

entry.title: breakdown of the item codes between Stock and WIP SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

How to breakdown of the item codes between Stock and WIP? we need to know what products are in WIP + what quantity/proportion of them are in WIP. 

SAP B1, SAP Business One, SBO

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Internal Server Error when logging into SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi All,

I installed B1 on a new users pc. But when she tried to login.. we get this error:

 

I uninstalled the client.. deleted all the temp files, appdata sap folder.. the SAP folder under program files. Restarted the machine and reinstalled B1 and got the exact error.

I tried her user on the browser access link and it works fine. Not sure if its a permissions issue somewhere, firewall? 
Has anyone seen this error before. We are on version 10 for HANA, FP2208.

Thanks All,
Jerusha

entry.title: Crystal report parameter with two columns show one colum only
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a customer with 2 databases on the same SAP server. (Windows Server 2019, SAP B1 10 fs 2202, SQL, #Crystal Report 2020 sp2)

In both databases I've loaded the same layout, that uses some parameter; one of these should show two columns, and this happens in one db but not in the other.

The parameter is configured as follow:

Livello@SELECT DISTINCT T5.StageID, T5.Name FROM OPMG T3 LEFT JOIN PMG1 T4 ON T3.AbsEntry=T4.AbsEntry LEFT JOIN PMG4 T0 ON T4.AbsEntry=T0.AbsEntry AND T0.StageID=T4.POS LEFT JOIN PMC2 T5 ON T4.StageID=T5.StageID WHERE T3.FIPROJECT='@Progetto'

Executing the SELECT in SQL with fixed values returns a value in each column.

I've tried to uses aliases, invert columns order, and other but anything has solved.

Someone has an idea?
Alessio

entry.title: C# SAPbouiCOM: SaveFileDialog shows behind SAP window.
entry.content:
SaveFileDialog shows and can be used but it shows behind the SAP window.

I've tested run with C# in Visual Studio and it works very well being in front of the SAP window. But after added it with Lightweight Deployment, it became behind.

Here is the code I use,

 

System.Threading.Thread thread = new System.Threading.Thread(() => {
    using (System.Windows.Forms.SaveFileDialog saveFileDialog = new System.Windows.Forms.SaveFileDialog())
    {
        System.Windows.Forms.Form form = new System.Windows.Forms.Form();
        form.TopMost = true;
        saveFileDialog.ShowDialog(form);
    }
}
thread.SetApartmentState(System.Threading.ApartmentState.STA);
thread.Start();

entry.title: WIP Consumption report into SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

How to breakdown of the item codes between Stock and WIP? we need to know what products are in WIP + what quantity/proportion of them are in WIP.  Or like WIP Consumption report into SAP B1 

SAP B1, SAP Business One, SBO

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Query-Based Approval Not Triggering Re-Approval in Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have configured a query-based approval process for sales orders. However, once a document is approved, the originator can modify the values, change items, or add new items without triggering a re-approval. The system only initiates re-approval under standard conditions (such as the "Always" option or predefined standard conditions).

Is this a system limitation or a potential bug? Alternatively, is there a configuration setting that needs to be adjusted to ensure that modifications to an approved document trigger re-approval?

Looking forward to your insights.

Best regards,
Sreesaj S

entry.title: Fixed Asset History Sheet
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it possible to edit the System Fixed Asset History Sheet to filter by Capitalization Acquisition's Posting Date instead of Asset Value Date?  

Our client has postings in Acquisition with Posting Date later than Asset Value Date.

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: About SAP B1 10.00.120 WEB CLIENT OPEN IS BLANK PAGE
entry.content: When I open web clinet, I am prompted that sapui is out of date, as shown in the picture. What should I do to access web clinet normally?

entry.title: About sap b1 sdk use
entry.content:
private void OnCustomInitialize()
{
oForm = (SAPbouiCOM.Form)sbo_app.Forms.ActiveForm;


if (oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Count == 0)
{
dt = oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Add("dt");
}
else
{
try
{
dt = oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Item("dt");
}
catch
{
dt = oForm.DataSources.DataTables.Add("dt");
}
}
string query = "SELECT u_t001 FROM [@itemproperties2]";
dt.ExecuteQuery(query);


Matrix0.Clear();


SAPbouiCOM.Column column = Matrix0.Columns.Item("cl_a");
column.DataBind.Bind("dt", "u_t001");


Matrix0.LoadFromDataSource();


if (Matrix0.RowCount > 0)
{

 


Matrix0.SelectRow(1, true, false);
}
}

I want to ask how to set martix to load data when it is opened? I set up the data source and bind data to the corresponding column, why is it not automatically loaded when it is opened, or why is it not displayed?

entry.title: Service Layer doesn't trigger Approval SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello

We have an application that create sales order in SAP B1 via service layer

The sales order document has an approval process and it's work well in SAP B1

But when we do the same via Service layer , it's create the sales order directly and doesn't transform it on draft etc..

I activated the function 'Enable Approval Process in DI'

The user 'manager' trigger the approval when creating the document and is the same that we use in our test (Application and even via postman) the sales order is still created directly

{
    "CardCode": "CBONIFAIXD",
    "DocDueDate": "2025-03-14",
    "DocumentLines": [
        {
            "ItemCode": "71.150",
            "Quantity": "200"
        }
    ]
}

 

Can you please help ?

entry.title: FP2502 Client crash - session timed out.
entry.content:
hi,

in the new SAP Business One FP2502 there is a client crash.

The already deleted the screen lock in the common settings as also the screen lock value  in the user settings.

Is there a workaround or do we have to wait until the next hotfix.

best regards

Markus
